guide.title: Suno niŇčmaa gb…õts…Ē…Ēm…Ē
guide.subtitle: B…Ē ni afe…Ē am…Ē…Ē gbee k…õ guitar he…Ē ni an√°a yibii ni hi fe f…õ…õ.
guide.intro: Suno tsu…Ē nii jogbaŇčŇč k…õ saji ni he tse, ni shishinum…Ē b…õ he. Gb…õts…Ē…Ēm…Ē n…õ…õ wie…Ē hesaam…Ē, otii ni ak…õmam…Ē hi…õ, k…õ minitii 3‚Äď5 niŇčmaa ni aŇčmalaa l…õ he.

prep.title: Hesaam…Ē
prep.body: Ňämalam…Ē y…õ tsu ko ni atsa mli loo tsu ko ni nibii ni y…Ē…Ē bl…õoo babaoo y…Ē…Ē mli (muji, ts…Ēji, atadei ni y…Ē…Ē ts…Ēne mli). Gbe fans k…õ n…Ē f…õ…õ n…Ē ni tswaa gbee. Ok…õ ogbee l…õ awo la mli minitii 5 dani ok…õwo ts…Ēne mli.

levels.title: Gb…õjian…Ētoi: -12 k…õyashi -6 dBFS
levels.body: Kw…õm…Ē Ňčw…õi Ňčw…õi ni y…Ē…Ē -12 k…õ -6 dBFS teŇč y…õ mita l…õ n…Ē. Y…õ nakai Ňčw…õi Ňčta l…õ shishi l…õ, s…õ…õgb…õ gb…õ…õm…Ē l…õ bafe…Ē n…Ē ni kadi…Ē m…Ē waa; y…õ en…Ē l…õ, oshara ni ji Ňčm…Ēl…Ē l…õ yaa hi…õ. K…õ mita ni y…Ē…Ē Record baafa l…õ n…Ē l…õ ato o-gain l…õ he gb…õjian…Ē dani ob…Ēi.

distance.title: Mic j…õk…õm…Ē: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Ok…õ maikrofon l…õ teŇč j…õk…õm…Ē ahi shi 15 k…õyashi 30 cm. N…Ē ni b…õŇčk…õ fe nakai l…õ fe…Ē plosives k…õ b…õŇčk…õm…Ē he hewal…õ; sh…ĒŇčŇč l…õ jie…Ē room reverb k…õ dede babaoo.

script.spoken_phrase: Wiem…Ē kuku kome ni awie, koni Suno any…õ akane ogbee l…õ

expectations.title: N…Ē ni Suno kpaa gb…õ
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dry (ak…õ gbee loo n…Ē ko ni j…õ…Ē mli baa), minitii 3 k…õyashi 5 ni ak…õkw…õ…Ē nii amli. Bei pii l…õ, minitii 2 ni he tse fe f…õ…õ, ni dam…Ē shi fe f…õ…õ l…õ haa n…Ē ni hi fe f…õ…õ baa.

suno_voice_full.name: Gbee niŇčmaa muu l…õ f…õ…õ k…õha Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Minitii 5 ni akud…Ē…Ē: shwerem…Ē, vowels, skel, lala mli kukuji eny…Ē, dynamics, k…õ wiem…Ē kuku ni awie…Ē.

step.warmup_inst: Gbalam…Ē ohe k…õ Ňčm…Ēl…Ē, lip trills (brrr), k…õ Ňčm…Ēl…Ē ni y…Ē…Ē bl…õoo aaafee minitii kome. Ehe ehiaaa ni ok…õ ohe awo mli ‚ÄĒ eji ni ok…õ otsitsi l…õ aj…Ē…Ē ohe dani ola lala k…õk…õ.
step.vowels_inst: Hi…õ vowel f…õ…õ vowel ‚ÄĒ a, e, i, o, u ‚ÄĒ s…õk…õndii 3 k…õyashi 4 y…õ ogb…õ…õm…Ē ni haa ohe j…Ē…Ē l…õ naa, k…õ gbee ni y…Ē…Ē shiŇčŇč. En…õ ye…Ē ebuaa Suno ni ejie…Ē ogbee l…õ mli gbee kr…ĒŇčŇč l…õ kpo.
step.scales_inst: Lala skel ni y…Ē…Ē ml…õo k…õyaa Ňčw…õi k…õ shi, y…õ "la" loo "na". Ehe ehiaaa ni eye emuu ‚ÄĒ oti ni ma ehi…õ ji ni ok…õ ogbee l…õ afee map.
step.section_inst: Lala lala l…õ mli saji 8 k…õyashi 16, k…õ yiŇčtoo di…õŇčts…õ ni otao…Ē ots…Ē…Ē l…õ. Ha mlits…Ē…Ēm…Ē k…õ hi…õ ni y…Ē…Ē l…õ afee n…Ē ni he hiaa fe Ňčaa gb…õ n…Ē emuuyeli.
step.section2_inst: Lala 8 k…õyashi 16 krokom…õi ‚ÄĒ k…õŐĀ ebaahi l…õ, lala loo f√£ ko ni k…õ n…Ē ni ts…Ē hi…õ l…õ kp√£aa gbee. Sr…Ētoi babaoo ye…Ē ebuaa m…Ēd…õl l…õ ni ekase…Ē ogbee.
step.dynamics_inst: Lala wiem…Ē kuku kome too l…õ n…ĒŇčŇč ni ob…Ēi bl…õoo waa ni ogbe naa waa, ni ok…õ otsitsi akatswa. En…õ ts…Ē…Ē Suno b…Ē ni ogbee l…õ tsake…Ē ehaa.
step.spoken_inst: Wiem…Ē ‚ÄĒ kaala ‚ÄĒ wiem…Ē kuku, ni ji adeb…Ē…Ē mli wiem…Ē, tam…Ē n…Ē ni ny…õmiigba sane. En…õ ye…Ē ebuaa Suno ni ey…Ēse…Ē ogbee l…õ mli gbee di…õŇčts…õ.
